name: Final Readiness + Beta Safety Batch
not_production_payroll_yet: No real tax filing or withholding engine
No legally final payroll compliance engine
must_happen_before_real_users_or_payroll: Connect Tower authentication to real identity/session backend
Add real payroll provider or payroll processing backend
Add legal/compliance review for payroll language and workflows
Add privacy/security review before collecting real employee data
tower_safety_rules: Tower clearance page must not show proof/thread records before clearance
Owner authority should not be revocable by manager/employee flows
Tower proof/thread content can be re-added later only inside a cleared Tower workspace
